positive: Minimalist line-art illustration of a celestial fox spirit (huli jing) sitting gracefully among stylized mountain peaks and glowing crescent moons. The composition should feature a central, clean silhouette of the fox and mountains, using negative space effectively. The style should be abstract, neo-traditional Japanese ukiyo-e meeting clean modern tattoo art, rendered in deep indigo, burnt orange, and crisp gold outlines. High contrast, flat color application, suitable for single-color screen printing on apparel. Perfect symmetrical balance and central focus. Studio lighting, vector graphics feel, very clean lines.
negative: blur, smudges, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy lines, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low detail, photographic, 3d render
